news.summary: In New York, OS Therapies (NYSE-A: OSTX) has introduced OS Animal Health, Inc., a subsidiary dedicated to bringing OST-HER2 to market for treating canine osteosarcoma. The market potential for OST-HER2 in this sector surpasses $150 million. New findings show its effectiveness in preventing amputation in initial-stage cases of canine osteosarcoma and in managing the condition.
news.headline: OS Therapies launches OS Animal Health to market OST-HER2 for canine osteosarcoma, with $150 million market opportunity.

news.summary: Barnwell Industries, Inc. reported its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025, with revenue from continuing operations at $3,569,000 and a net loss of $1,538,000 compared to $4,678,000 revenue and $1,306,000 net loss in the prior year. The loss was attributed to increased general and administrative expenses, a decrease in land investment segment results, and impairment costs. The company also sold its subsidiary, Water Resources, for $1,050,000, recording a loss of $193,000. The ongoing proxy contest and tariffs have raised concerns about future cash inflows, leading to doubts about the company's ability to continue. The company is exploring funding sources but faces liquidity and growth challenges. CEO Craig D. Hopkins stated plans to refocus efforts, reduce fixed costs, and enhance profitability. Barnwell had a working capital deficit of $57,000 and $1,432,000 in cash and cash equivalents at the end of the quarter. The company emphasizes forward-looking statements and the risks involved in such scenarios.
news.headline: Barnwell Industries, Inc. reported revenue of $3,569,000 and a net loss of $1,538,000 for Q2 2025, citing increased expenses and decreased production. The company completed the sale of Water Resources for $1,050,000. Proxy contest expenses have impacted liquidity and future funding remains uncertain. CEO aims to reduce costs and enhance profitability for investment opportunities. Working capital deficit of $57,000. Shares forward-looking statements, risks, and uncertainties.

news.summary: Keyera Corp. reported its first quarter financial results with adjusted EBITDA of $298 million (compared to $314 million in Q1 2024) and distributable cash flow of $190 million or $0.83 per share (compared to $205 million or $0.90 per share in Q1 2024). Net earnings were reported at $130 million. The company's fee-for-service realized margin was $262 million, up 9% from the previous year. The company ended the quarter with net debt to adjusted EBITDA of 2.0 times. Keyera sanctioned the KFS Frac III project costing $500 million, aimed at expanding fractionation capacity by 60%, and leading to further growth opportunities. Their growth capital expenditures are expected to range between $300 million and $330 million, with maintenance capital expenditures ranging between $70 million and $90 million. Keyera remains focused on achieving a fee-based adjusted EBITDA growth target of 7-8% from 2024 to 2027.
news.headline: Keyera Corp announces $298M adjusted EBITDA, $190M DCF for Q1 2025. KFS Frac III expansion sanctioned for $500M into service mid-2028.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Clerk Chat, a cutting-edge customer experience platform, unveiled a pioneering collaboration with Google, Verizon, T-Mobile, and AT&T. This partnership marks the first multi-carrier RCS messaging deployment in North America, delivering interactive digital content. By teaming up with Google and the top three communication providers, Clerk Chat is reshaping conventional SMS announcements into engaging, interactive experiences. This initiative showcases a strategic shift towards enhancing customer engagement and revolutionizing the way businesses interact with their audiences.
news.headline: Clerk Chat launches first North American RCS experience with Google, Verizon, T-Mobile, and AT&T, transforming traditional SMS messaging.

news.summary: A collaboration between Kraft Heinz and Uber Eats has resulted in the introduction of HEINZ Verified - a program designed to help consumers identify restaurants that offer HEINZ products. This partnership will provide customers with the opportunity to easily locate establishments that serve HEINZ condiments and other products. By working together, Kraft Heinz and Uber Eats aim to enhance the dining experience for consumers while simultaneously promoting the presence of HEINZ in the market.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Liquibase, a prominent player in the field of Database DevOps, unveiled the Liquibase Pro Extension for Databricks, in collaboration with the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform. This new integration aims to aid data and platform teams in efficiently handling schema modifications in Databricks SQL, enhancing speed, organization, and assurance. With the increasing dependence of numerous organizations on Databricks for crucial analytics, AI operations, and high-quality data offerings, the management of database alterations is gaining importance.
news.headline: Liquibase partners with Databricks in Texas to offer Liquibase Pro Extension for Databricks, aiding in schema changes in Databricks SQL with efficiency.

news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Royal Philips, a prominent player in health technology, has released its 2025 Future Health Index U.S. report titled “Building trust in healthcare AI.” The report sheds light on the current state of healthcare and exposes a notable trust disparity between healthcare professionals (HCPs) and patients concerning the utilization of AI in healthcare. This report, which marks the 10th edition commissioned by Philips, highlights a healthcare system facing increasing pressure and indicates the potential of AI to offer support.
news.headline: Philips report shows trust gap in healthcare AI between clinicians and patients; signals AI can help system under strain.

news.summary: In San Francisco, LiveRamp (NYSE: RAMP) and RE/MAX, LLC (NYSE: RMAX) revealed their partnership to launch the REMAX Media Network. This collaboration aims to link advertisers with the RE/MAX consumer base. The LiveRamp Clean Room will integrate touchpoints within the REMAX brand to target the sizable digital audience, including 7.6 million monthly users and 24.7 million impressions.
news.headline: LiveRamp and REMAX partner to create REMAX Media Network, reaching 7.6M users and 24.7M impressions monthly.

news.summary: In response to a slowing job market and increasing emotional strain, the Professional Association of Résumé Writers and Career Coaches (PARWCC) is providing specialized training to its members through consecutive Master Series events. This initiative aims to safeguard both clients and professionals themselves amidst the current challenges. The program is being rolled out in St. Petersburg, Florida, with the first session scheduled for May 15, 2025. As layoffs resurface, particularly impacting industries such as technology, finance, and healthcare, the need for enhanced skills and support in the job market has become crucial.
news.headline: PARWCC launches urgent support series for career coaches as layoffs rise. Back-to-back Master Series aims to protect clients and coaches.

news.summary: Telegram has taken action against thousands of accounts associated with the black market, previously known as Huione Guarantee. Despite this ban, new spin-off accounts are quickly emerging to take their place.
news.headline: Thousands of accounts linked to black market, previously Huione Guarantee, have been banned by Telegram for criminal activities. New spin-offs are emerging.

news.summary: Pareto, a private credit marketplace, has launched a new synthetic dollar called USP, backed 1:1 by stablecoins like USDC and USDT. The USP tokens are collateralized with real-world private credit loans to vetted institutional borrowers, generating yields for users. This move exemplifies the growing role of stablecoins in global finance. Pareto uses native backing and an arbitrage mechanism to maintain USP's peg to the US dollar and has a stability reserve in place. The synthetic dollar provides institutional investors with a regulated entry into the real-world asset credit markets. The total stablecoin market is nearing $250 billion, with Tether accounting for around $150 billion. US regulators are taking interest in stablecoin legislation, recognizing its importance in supporting the dollar's reserve currency status. Synthetic dollars are driving innovation in the stablecoin market, despite collateralized stablecoins dominating currently.
news.headline: Pareto launches new synthetic dollar backed by private credit, fully collateralized with 1:1 stablecoins. Institutional entry into RWA credit market grows rapidly. Synthetic dollars drive stablecoin innovation, with Ethena offering 10% yield to 368k investors. US recognizes stablecoins' role in global finance. Total stablecoin market nears $250B, Tether at $150B. US regulators prioritize stablecoin legislation to maintain dollar primacy.

news.summary: Ethereum introduces the 'Trillion Dollar Security' campaign to improve blockchain security measures. The initiative aims to safeguard trillions worth of assets and bolster the global financial system’s infrastructure.
news.headline: Ethereum introduces 'Trillion Dollar Security' project to protect trillions in value and strengthen global finance.

news.summary: Tether has recently launched QVAC, a new platform designed for deploying AI agents directly on user devices. This innovative approach aims to prioritize user privacy and autonomy by removing the need for centralized data centers. With QVAC, individuals can now benefit from AI capabilities without compromising their personal data. This advancement aligns with the growing concerns over data privacy and security issues. By shifting the AI deployment to user devices, Tether is paving the way for a more secure and user-centric AI experience.
news.headline: New from Tether: QVAC allows AI deployment on user devices, ensuring privacy and autonomy without centralized data centers.

news.summary: The LangGraph Platform has officially been launched for public use, providing a robust system for deploying and overseeing stateful agents with ease. Users can take advantage of features such as one-click deployment and the ability to scale horizontally.
news.headline: New LangGraph Platform for stateful agents launched, providing 1-click deployment and horizontal scaling for enhanced efficiency.

news.summary: Manta Network has introduced its ETH pool on Stargate, aiming to improve cross-chain interoperability and broaden DeFi possibilities by facilitating smooth transfers of ETH. This development is significant as it enables users to seamlessly engage with the decentralized finance ecosystem using Ethereum, enhancing interoperability in the blockchain space. The introduction of this ETH pool marks a pivotal moment for the network, with potential implications for the decentralized finance sector. Users can now experience enhanced accessibility and efficiency in managing their assets across chains, opening up new opportunities for DeFi engagement. The launch of the ETH pool on Stargate signifies Manta Network's commitment to advancing decentralized finance and exploring innovative solutions for enhancing blockchain functionality. This move is expected to have a notable impact on the DeFi landscape, further solidifying Manta Network's position in the industry.
news.headline: Manta Network reveals new ETH pool on Stargate, improving cross-chain transactions and boosting DeFi options.

news.summary: The recent Pectra upgrade on Ethereum has significantly boosted blob capacity, leading to notable effects on the blob market, rollups, and ETH burning process. This upgrade has brought about crucial changes in data availability and rollup economics, influencing the overall dynamics of the Ethereum network.
news.headline: Ethereum's Pectra upgrade boosts blob capacity, affecting rollup costs and ETH burning. Learn about the implications.
